cases.prompt: Configure deployment to Laravel Forge with database, cache, and queue workers
cases.expect: Creates deploy.sh script with git pull, migrations, cache clear, queue restart; documents Forge webhook URL setup; lists required environment variables (DB_*, REDIS_*, AWS_*)

cases.prompt: Set up Docker containerization for my Laravel app with MySQL and Redis services
cases.expect: Creates Dockerfile with multi-stage build, PHP-FPM setup, and composer install; creates docker-compose.yml with app, MySQL, Redis, Nginx services
